components.name: Accordion
components.description: Expandable accordion with multiple panels, single/multi expand modes.

components.name: Alert
components.description: Alert component for displaying important messages with severity levels, icons, and dismissible support.

components.name: AppBar
components.description: Top app bar with navigation toggle, title, actions, and sticky/scroll behavior.

components.name: Autocomplete
components.description: Autocomplete input with search, filtering, and item template support.

components.name: Avatar
components.description: Avatar component for user profile images, initials, or icons with grouping support.

components.name: AvatarGroup
components.description: Group of overlapping avatars with overflow count indicator.

components.name: Backstage
components.description: Office-style backstage view that slides in over the app with category navigation and content panels.

components.name: Badge
components.description: Badge component for displaying counts, status indicators, or labels.

components.name: Breadcrumb
components.description: Breadcrumb navigation trail showing the current page's location in the hierarchy.

components.name: Button
components.description: Highly customizable button with five visual variants (Filled/Outlined/Text/Elevated/Tonal), leading/trailing icons, loading state with spinner, link mode via Href, press-morph animation, and color support via FlareColor.

components.name: ButtonGroup
components.description: Group of buttons with shared variant, color, and size.

components.name: Calendar
components.description: Standalone calendar for date selection, date range, and event display.

components.name: Card
components.description: Card container with five visual variants (Elevated/Filled/Outlined/Tonal/Text), selectable state, link mode (Href), compact horizontal layout, and sub-component anatomy (Header/Content/Footer/Actions/Media).

components.name: Carousel
components.description: Image/content carousel with slide transitions, autoplay, and navigation controls. Separate package: Flare.Components.Carousel.

components.name: Chart
components.description: SVG chart component supporting line, bar, pie, and donut charts with theme colors, hover tooltips, and legend.

components.name: Checkbox
components.description: Checkbox component for boolean values with label and indeterminate state.

components.name: CheckboxGroup
components.description: Group of checkboxes for multi-selection with validation support.

components.name: Chip
components.description: Chip/tag component for filtering, selection, or displaying categories with optional icons and close button.

components.name: ChipGroup
components.description: Container for multiple chips with selection and filtering support.

components.name: Clipboard
components.description: Copy-to-clipboard utility with feedback via IFlareClipboard service.

components.name: ClockDial
components.description: Analog clock face for time selection with hour and minute hands.

components.name: CodeBlock
components.description: Syntax-highlighted code block with line numbers, copy button, and language detection.

components.name: ColorCustomizer
components.description: UI widget to customize theme colors at runtime with palette and mode selection.

components.name: ColorModeToggle
components.description: Button toggle to switch between light and dark mode.

components.name: ColorPicker
components.description: Color picker with preset swatches, custom hex input, and RGB sliders.

components.name: ConfirmDialogProvider
components.description: Provider for IDialogService.ConfirmAsync showing themed confirmation dialogs.

components.name: Container
components.description: Centered content container with configurable max-width breakpoints.

components.name: DataGrid
components.description: Advanced data grid with sorting, filtering, paging, grouping, virtualization, column resize, row selection, inline editing, and CSV export.

components.name: DataTree
components.description: Tree view for arbitrary data with lazy loading, checkboxes, and icons.

components.name: DatePicker
components.description: Date picker with calendar popup, min/max dates, and format options.

components.name: DateRangePicker
components.description: Date range picker for selecting start and end dates with a calendar popup.

components.name: DateTimePicker
components.description: Combined date and time picker in a single component.

components.name: Dialog
components.description: Modal dialog with title, icon, body content, actions, scrim close, ESC close, and divider. Use with IDialogService or standalone via @bind-Visible.

components.name: DialogProvider
components.description: Provider component for the dialog service. Place once in the layout to enable IDialogService.

components.name: Divider
components.description: Horizontal or vertical divider line separating content sections.

components.name: DocumentTabs
components.description: Tabbed document container like Visual Studio's editor tabs. Separate package: Flare.Components.IDE.

components.name: Drawer
components.description: Slide-out drawer panel from any screen edge for navigation or content.

components.name: DropZone
components.description: Drag and drop target area for file uploads with visual feedback.

components.name: EmptyState
components.description: Empty state placeholder with icon, title, description, and optional action button.

components.name: FileUpload
components.description: File upload component with drag-and-drop, multi-file, preview, and progress support.

components.name: FloatingActionButton
components.description: Material FAB - floating circular action button pinned to the viewport.

components.name: FloatingActionMenu
components.description: FAB that expands into a radial or vertical menu of action items.

components.name: Form
components.description: Wraps Blazor's EditForm with Flare-styled layout, validation summary, and submit handling.

components.name: FormBuilder
components.description: Dynamic form builder that generates form fields from metadata/models at runtime.

components.name: Grid
components.description: CSS grid layout component with responsive column spans and gutters.

components.name: Hidden
components.description: Conditionally hide content based on responsive breakpoints.

components.name: Highlighter
components.description: Highlights matching text within a string with a colored background.

components.name: Icon
components.description: Material Symbols icon component with configurable size, fill, weight, and grade.

components.name: IdeLayout
components.description: IDE shell layout with ribbon, document tabs, tool panels, splitter, and status bar. Separate package: Flare.Components.IDE.

components.name: Image
components.description: Image component with lazy loading, placeholders, error fallback, and aspect ratio.

components.name: InfiniteScroll
components.description: Scroll container that triggers data loading when reaching the bottom.

components.name: Kanban
components.description: Kanban board with draggable cards, swimlanes, and column management. Separate package: Flare.Components.Kanban.

components.name: Layout
components.description: Responsive page layout with app bar, drawer, and content areas.

components.name: Lazy
components.description: Lazy-loads content only when scrolled into the viewport for performance.

components.name: Link
components.description: Anchor link component with theme colors, underline options, and icon support.

components.name: List
components.description: Simple list component with items, dividers, and selection support.

components.name: Listbox
components.description: Scrollable list selection with single and multi-select modes.

components.name: Markdown
components.description: Markdown renderer that converts markdown text to HTML with syntax highlighting.

components.name: MaskedField
components.description: Text input with input mask for formatted values like phone numbers, dates, etc.

components.name: MediaQuery
components.description: Conditionally renders content based on CSS media query breakpoints.

components.name: Menu
components.description: Dropdown menu component with items, groups, submenus, and keyboard navigation.

components.name: MenuBar
components.description: Horizontal menu bar with drop-down menus, similar to desktop application menus.

components.name: MessageBoxProvider
components.description: Provider for message box dialogs via IMessageBoxService. Place once in layout.

components.name: MultiSelect
components.description: Multi-select dropdown with chips for selected values and search filtering.

components.name: NavMenu
components.description: Navigation menu with nested groups, links, and auto-expand for active routes.

components.name: NumericField
components.description: Number input field with increment/decrement buttons, min/max validation.

components.name: OnThisPage
components.description: Table of contents that highlights the current section based on scroll position.

components.name: OtpField
components.description: One-time password / verification code input with individual character boxes.

components.name: Overlay
components.description: Semi-transparent backdrop used behind dialogs, drawers, and menus.

components.name: Pagination
components.description: Pagination component with page buttons, ellipsis, first/last navigation, and page size control.

components.name: Paper
components.description: Elevated surface panel with shadow and optional outline.

components.name: PasswordField
components.description: Password input with show/hide toggle and strength indicator.

components.name: Popover
components.description: Popover overlay anchored to an element for contextual content.

components.name: Progress
components.description: Progress indicator with linear and circular variants, determinate and indeterminate modes.

components.name: PropertyGrid
components.description: Property grid for displaying and editing object properties in key-value rows.

components.name: QrCode
components.description: QR code generator that renders an SVG QR code from string data. Separate package: Flare.Components.QrCode.

components.name: Radio
components.description: Radio button for single selection within a group.

components.name: Rating
components.description: Star rating input with customizable count, size, and color.

components.name: Resizable
components.description: Resizable container with drag handles on any edge.

components.name: Ribbon
components.description: Office-style ribbon toolbar with tabs, groups, buttons, and dropdowns. Separate package: Flare.Components.IDE.

components.name: RichTextEditor
components.description: WYSIWYG rich text editor with formatting toolbar. Separate package: Flare.Components.RichTextEditor.

components.name: ScrollTop
components.description: Floating button that appears when scrolling down to quickly jump to top.

components.name: Select
components.description: Single-value dropdown select with search, grouping, virtualization, declarative <option> parsing, ItemTemplate/ValueTemplate, and full field chrome (label, helper, validation).

components.name: SignaturePad
components.description: Signature capture component for drawing signatures with touch or mouse.

components.name: Skeleton
components.description: Skeleton loading placeholder for text, cards, avatars, and other content shapes.

components.name: Slider
components.description: Slider for selecting a numeric value or range with MD3 Expressive + Fluent support.

components.name: Snackbar
components.description: Snackbar notification system. Use ISnackbarService to show notifications programmatically.

components.name: Spacer
components.description: Flex spacer that fills remaining space in a flex container.

components.name: SpeedDial
components.description: Speed dial component that expands into multiple action buttons on click.

components.name: SplitButton
components.description: Button with a dropdown menu for additional actions. Main action + more options pattern.

components.name: Splitter
components.description: Resizable split panels with draggable divider, horizontal or vertical.

components.name: Stack
components.description: Flexbox layout component for horizontal or vertical stacking with spacing.

components.name: StatusBar
components.description: Status bar with sections for messages, progress, and indicators. Separate package: Flare.Components.IDE.

components.name: Stepper
components.description: Stepper wizard component for multi-step processes with linear/non-linear modes.

components.name: Switch
components.description: Toggle switch component for boolean values with label support.

components.name: Table
components.description: Simple read-only table with themed styling, less feature-rich than DataGrid.

components.name: TableOfContents
components.description: Table of contents with nested link hierarchy and expand/collapse.

components.name: Tabs
components.description: Tabbed navigation container with animated active indicator.

components.name: TagField
components.description: Tag/chips input field for multiple values like email recipients or keywords.

components.name: Text
components.description: Typography component for rendering text with theme-aware type scales and colors.

components.name: TextArea
components.description: Multi-line text input with auto-resize support.

components.name: TextField
components.description: Single-line text input field with label, placeholder, leading/trailing icons, adornments, floating label, character counter, clearable, validation, and Color/Variant/Size controls.

components.name: ThemeProvider
components.description: Root component that cascades IThemeService and ThemeSnapshot to all Flare components. Wrap your entire app.

components.name: ThemeScope
components.description: Scoped theme override for a section of the page with independent tokens.

components.name: Timeline
components.description: Vertical timeline with themed dots, connectors, and content panels.

components.name: TimePicker
components.description: Time picker with clock dial or text input, AM/PM support.

components.name: ToggleButton
components.description: Button that toggles between selected and unselected states.

components.name: ToggleGroup
components.description: Group of toggle buttons where only one (or multiple) can be selected at a time.

components.name: Toolbar
components.description: Horizontal toolbar with groups of buttons, separators, and icons.

components.name: ToolPanel
components.description: Dockable tool panel for IDE layouts like Solution Explorer. Separate package: Flare.Components.IDE.

components.name: Tooltip
components.description: Tooltip overlay that shows contextual help text on hover or focus.

components.name: Transfer
components.description: Dual list transfer component for moving items between two lists. Separate package: Flare.Components.Transfer.

components.name: TreeView
components.description: Hierarchical tree view with expand/collapse, checkboxes, drag-and-drop, and lazy loading.

components.name: ValidationSummary
components.description: Displays validation error messages from the EditContext in a themed alert block.

components.name: VideoPlayer
components.description: Video player with controls, poster, and streaming support. Separate package: Flare.Components.Media.

components.name: VirtualList
components.description: Virtualized scrolling list that only renders visible items for performance.
